PAGE_FOLDER - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
 
password - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.UserBean
Password of the user.
phoneNo - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
Contact phone number of the college.
physics - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.MarksheetBean
Marks obtained in Physics.

Populates the generic bean from request parameters.

Populates the UserBean with the password data from the request.

Populates the CollegeBean from the incoming request parameters.

Populates the FacultyBean representing search criteria from the request.

Populates a MarksheetBean object from the parameters received in the request.

populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Populates the common auditing fields (CreatedBy, ModifiedBy, CreatedDatetime, ModifiedDatetime) into the DTO from the request and session data.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Loads required data into the request before forwarding to the view.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeListCtl
Preloads the college list into the request for use in drop-downs or initial displays.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseListCtl
Preloads the course list into the request for initial displays.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FacultyCtl
Preloads required relational data (Colleges, Subjects, Courses) into the request.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Preloads the student list into the request for selection in the form.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentCtl
Preloads the college list into the request for selection in the form.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.SubjectCtl
Preloads the course list into the request for selection in the form.

Preloads the subject and course lists into the request for filter drop-downs.

Preloads the subject and course lists into the request for selection in the form.

Preloads the subject and course lists into the request for filter drop-downs.

Preloads the role list into the request for selection in the form.
